message:
enhance(beads): Add comprehensive descriptions and logging to all test beads

Content Quality Review:
- Verified all 10 epics and 70+ subtasks have comprehensive descriptions
- Enhanced 39 beads that had empty descriptions across 6 epics:
  - Error (7): ea9, 6sg, 1bh, 666, 5nv, gya, w5u
  - Derive (6): i8d, 2gx, 9e9, 31d, 2ty, mbx
  - Table (5): ky3, pyj, ypp, zvm, 6ad
  - WASM (7): ejn, 5vw, wah, rb4, on0, 8f7, pat
  - Theme (7): od6, i3b, xgt, uvb, tl3, bca, jhp
  - PropTest (7): z4q, nb7, wbj, dsp, nq6, d66, la4

Test Bead Enhancements:
- Enhanced 6 test beads with short descriptions (uvo, 23j, 2vy, 6m0, ffy, rpt)
- Added logging requirements to 4 test beads missing them (na0, 6kg, 9dh, alt)

All descriptions now include:
- Detailed code examples
- Acceptance criteria with checkboxes
- Implementation notes
- Logging requirements for test visibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
